query:
SELECT volumeId, size, status, AvailabilityZone, volumeType, createTime
FROM aws.ec2_native.volumes
WHERE region = 'ap-southeast-2'

suggested_remediation.preflight_query: SELECT volumeId FROM aws.ec2_native.volumes WHERE region = 'ap-southeast-2' AND volumeId = 'vol-0e4d9f7a49a86b6e4' AND status = 'available'
suggested_remediation.sql_query: DELETE FROM aws.ec2.volumes WHERE region = 'ap-southeast-2' AND VolumeId = 'vol-0e4d9f7a49a86b6e4'
suggested_remediation.description: Delete the unattached EBS volume (snapshot first if its data may be needed).
